## Hardware Checklist
>Does the user need a GIS Modeling computer?
- [ ]  GIS Laptop w/ docking station + power supply
- [ ]  Laptop + power supply

### Request peripherals (If desk space does not come equipped)
- [ ]  Docking station
- [ ]  Monitors
- [ ]  Keyboard (hardwired)
- [ ]  Mouse (hardwired)
*Headphones
DTS Tech Services does not supply as we do not have them regularly on-hand (Please talk to your supervisor and use the office supply contract)
